Task Name: Create GitHub repository
Description: Go to github.com, create private repo named english-buddy. Do NOT add README.

Task Name: Add .gitignore, README, Procfile, requirements.txt
Description: Use the files generated by Claude. Place in repo root.

Task Name: Create folder structure (frontend/ backend/ static/)
Description: mkdir frontend backend static — move english_buddy.html to frontend/, server.py to backend/

Task Name: Push all existing files to GitHub
Description: git add . && git commit -m "Initial commit" && git push -u origin main

Task Name: Create Supabase project (free tier)
Description: Go to supabase.com, create new project, save URL and anon key to .env file

Task Name: Create Supabase users table
Description: Columns: id (uuid), email, plan (text default free), created_at. Enable RLS.

Task Name: Create Supabase usage table
Description: Columns: id, user_id (fk), date (date), convo_count (int default 0)

Task Name: Add login screen to english_buddy.html
Description: Email + password fields. Show on load if no session token. Use Supabase JS SDK.

Task Name: Add signup screen to english_buddy.html
Description: Email + password + name. Call supabase.auth.signUp(). Redirect to app on success.

Task Name: Validate Supabase JWT in server.py on every /proxy call
Description: Read Authorization header, verify JWT with Supabase secret. Return 401 if invalid.

Task Name: Enforce 5 convos/day limit for free users in server.py
Description: On each /proxy call: query usage table for today. If count>=5 and plan=free, return 429.

Task Name: Create Stripe account and 2 products
Description: Products: Learner $3/mo, Pro $8/mo. Get publishable key, secret key, webhook secret.

Task Name: Add Stripe checkout redirect to english_buddy.html
Description: Upgrade button calls server /create-checkout, redirects to Stripe hosted page.

Task Name: Add /webhook route in server.py — update plan in Supabase
Description: Verify Stripe signature. On checkout.session.completed: update users.plan in Supabase.

Task Name: Test Stripe payments end-to-end in test mode
Description: Use test card 4242 4242 4242 4242. Verify plan updates in Supabase after payment.

Task Name: Deploy server.py to Railway
Description: railway.app → New Project → Deploy from GitHub → select english-buddy repo.

Task Name: Set environment variables in Railway dashboard
Description: Add: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, PORT

Task Name: Register domain englishbuddy.lk
Description: Use domains.google.com or Cloudflare Registrar. ~$15/year.

Task Name: Point domain DNS to Railway and enable HTTPS
Description: Railway Settings → Custom Domain → add englishbuddy.lk → update DNS A record at registrar.

Task Name: Set up GitHub Actions auto-deploy on push to main
Description: Railway auto-deploys on push by default when connected to GitHub. Verify this works.

Task Name: Create Facebook fan page — English Buddy LK
Description: Page name: English Buddy LK. Set CTA button to "Try it now" → englishbuddy.lk

Task Name: Record 15-second demo video for FB pinned post
Description: Screen record a conversation with Alex. Add Sinhala captions. Pin to FB page.

Task Name: Get 10 beta testers
Description: Share in WhatsApp groups and FB groups. Friends, family, tuition class contacts.

Task Name: Add age, level, native language fields to signup form
Description: Fields: age (number), level (select: Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced), native_lang (Sinhala/Tamil/Other)

Task Name: Save user profile to Supabase users table
Description: Add columns to users table: age, level, native_language. Save on signup.

Task Name: Inject user profile into AI system prompt in server.py
Description: On each /proxy call: fetch user profile from Supabase. Add to system prompt before sending to Claude.

Task Name: Write age-matched prompt variants (child / teen / adult)
Description: Child (<13): very simple words, fun. Teen (13-18): casual, relatable. Adult (18+): natural conversation.

Task Name: Write level-matched prompt variants (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
Description: Beginner: short sentences, repeat words. Intermediate: normal. Advanced: natural idioms, speed.

Task Name: Wire SVG avatar expressions to speech events in app
Description: talking→while speaking, nod→user finishes, thinking→waiting for AI, smile→positive reply, confused→mic error

Task Name: Add error highlighting — AI returns JSON errors alongside reply
Description: Prompt Claude to return {"reply":"...","errors":[{"word":"...","correction":"...","type":"grammar"}]}

Task Name: Render coloured error spans in transcript UI
Description: Grammar=orange, spelling=red, vocab=purple. Show correction on hover/tap.

Task Name: Add Sinhala error explanations
Description: Add to each error object: "sinhala_tip":"...". Render below the highlighted word.

Task Name: Add Tamil error explanations
Description: Same as Sinhala but Tamil. Show based on user native_language field.

Task Name: Build auto level-up detection (every 10 sessions)
Description: Every 10 sessions: send transcript to Claude, ask to rate fluency 1-10. If >7.5 for 2 checks: upgrade level.

Task Name: Build user progress dashboard
Description: Show: current streak, total sessions, topics practiced, current level, level progress bar.

Task Name: Build shareable result card after each conversation
Description: After convo ends: show card "I talked to Alex for X mins about [topic]!" with share buttons.

Task Name: Add WhatsApp share button
Description: Use wa.me URL scheme: https://wa.me/?text=Machan+try+this+englishbuddy.lk. Pre-written message.

Task Name: Add Facebook share button on result card
Description: Use FB sharer URL with the result card image or page URL.

Task Name: Build referral system — unique link + 1 week free
Description: Generate unique code per user. Track referrals in DB. On signup via code: add 7 days to referrer plan.

Task Name: Generate streak badge images at 3/7/30 day milestones
Description: Auto-generate canvas PNG badge. "Day 7 streak with English Buddy!" — shareable.

Task Name: Build school registration — student adds school at signup
Description: Add school field to signup. Create schools table in Supabase. Allow free-text or dropdown of known schools.

Task Name: Build public school leaderboard page
Description: Public page at /leaderboard. Shows top 20 schools by weekly conversation count.

Task Name: Add abuse prevention on leaderboard
Description: Rate limit convo counting. Flag suspicious spikes. Require verified email to count on board.

Task Name: Build teacher dashboard
Description: Pro tier feature. Teacher sees list of students, their session count, level, streak. Filter by week/month.

Task Name: Add topic assignment for teachers
Description: Teacher can set required topic for student. App prompts student with assigned topic on login.

Task Name: Export student progress as PDF
Description: Download button on teacher dashboard. Generate PDF with student stats table.

Task Name: Convert app to PWA
Description: Add manifest.json and service worker. App installable on Android Chrome from browser.

Task Name: Launch Facebook ads — LKR 500/day
Description: Target: Sri Lanka, age 15-25, interests: O/L exam, A/L exam, British Council, English learning. 7-day test.

Task Name: Integrate ElevenLabs TTS — Pro tier premium voice
Description: ElevenLabs API for natural voice output. Pro tier only. Fallback to browser TTS for free users.

Task Name: Build real-time lip sync with Rhubarb
Description: Rhubarb Lip Sync maps audio to phoneme mouth shapes. Drive SVG mouth animation frame-by-frame.

Task Name: Integrate D-ID API for photorealistic avatar
Description: D-ID API: upload face photo + audio → receive talking video. Pro tier. Handle 2-5s latency.

Task Name: Build job interview prep mode
Description: Structured scenario: Alex plays interviewer. Asks common questions. Gives feedback on answers. Track performance.

Task Name: Add IELTS speaking practice topic set
Description: IELTS Part 1/2/3 question sets. Timer. Alex scores fluency, vocabulary, grammar, pronunciation (AI-rated).

Task Name: Set up error monitoring with Sentry
Description: sentry.io free tier. Catch unhandled Python exceptions in server.py and JS errors in browser.

Task Name: Add DB connection pooling for scale
Description: Use Supabase connection pooler (PgBouncer). Required when >100 concurrent users hit server.py.

Task Name: Localise app for Bangladesh — Bengali error tips
Description: Duplicate topic prompts. Add Bengali error explanations. Register new domain. Deploy separate instance.

Task Name: Localise app for Nepal — Nepali error tips
Description: Same as Bangladesh but Nepali language. Target Kathmandu students.
